# AI-Driven Dev Docs

AIDD structures your AI coding assistant with commands, agents, rules, and memory.

## Structure

```text
aidd_docs/
├── memory/
│   ├── internal/
│   └── external/
├── tasks/
├── templates/
├── CATALOG.md
├── README.md
└── CONTRIBUTING.md
```

## v2 Update

This README was updated in framework v2.
